titleStmt.title: SII 8.612: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 612. (A.R. No. 303 of 1903). ON THE SAME WALL.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . kovi
rājakecaripaṉmaṟkku yāṇṭu
6vatu paruvamāṉa matināḷpa
kkam pañcamināḷ mūlaṅ kiḻa
mai veḷḷipotu muṉkoṟkuṟi
Itu nāḷitu paruvamāka Uṟaiyū
ākkūṟṟattu niṉṟun tuṇintu
poyat tarampaṟṟūrnāṭṭup paṭai
eviya brahma teyam Īcāṉamaṅ
kalattu naṉpaka lāvaṇattiyaṉ
ṟa bhū mivilaiyāvaṇamāvatu . Iv
vūrp pāratāyaṉ kaṇṭaṉ vi
ranāraṇaṉeṉ Ivvūrk kiḻur
Eṉṉuṭaiya tirumāliruñcolai va
yakka leṉṟu perkūvappaṭum
ceyyait tañcāvūrk kūṟṟattut
tañcāvūrperumāḷ peṇṭāṭṭi
veṭṭuvaṉ Ātittapiṭārikku vi
ṟṟaṟ kicaitta Ellai. kīḻpā
ṟkellai teṟku nokkip pā
ynta kaṇṭaṉvāykku merkku te
ṉpāṟkellai kiḻakku nokkip
poṉa teruvukku vaṭakku melpā
ṟkellai paruṭai nilattukku
k kiḻakku vaṭapāṟkellai Ikkaṇ
ṭaṉvāykkey teṟkum Ivvi
caitta perunāṉkellaiyuḷ
ḷakappaṭṭa nilam Uṇṇilam
Oḻiviṉṟi Aññūṟṟuc ciṉṉam
pāttiyum Uṇṇilam Oḻiviṉ
ṟi mikutikkuṟaivu Uḷḷaṭaṅka viṟ
ṟukkuṭuttu koṇṭa vilaippo
ruḷ veṭelviṭuku kallāṟ ṟuḷaip
poṉ muppatiṉ kaḻaiñcum Āva
ṇakkaḷiyiley niṟai niṟuppittu
kkoṇṭu Innilam vilaikkaṟa viṟṟup
poruḷaṟak koṇṭu Ituvey vilaiyāvaṇa
mum poruḷ māvaṟutip poruḷ celavolai
yum Ituve yāvatākavum viṟṟu vilaiyāva
ṇañ ceytu kuṭutteṉ veṭṭuvaṉ Āti
ttapiṭārikkup pāratāyaṉ kaṇṭaṉ viranārāya
ṇaṉeṉ . Aimparuṭai brahma pperuntiṇaikkāyk kaṇa
kkeḻutukiṉṟa tuvvūruṭaiyāṉ kāmaṉ ciṟap
paṉeṉ Ivai Eṉṉeḻuttu . Ippaṭi Oṭṭi viṟṟu
k kuṭutteṉ kaṇṭaṉ viranārāyaṇaṉeṉ Ivai
Eṉ ṉeḻuttu . Innilattai Ivvāṇṭey
coḻapperunteviyāṉa paṭṭaṉ malliye
ṉ. Eṅkaḷ Ācci veṭṭuvaṉ Āccapiṭāri I
vvūr pāratāyaṉ kaṇṭaṉ viranāraṇaṉiṭai vi
laikoṇṭu Uṭaiya tirumāliruñcolaivayakka le
ṉṟu perkūvappaṭuñ ceyye Ivariṭaip pe
ṟṟuṭaiya ceyp piramateyam veṭelviṭukuma
ṅkalattu nāṉ Eṭuppitta Ampalattukku Am
palappuṟamāka Uda kapūrvva ñ ceytukuṭuttu Itukku
nivantañ ceytapaṭi Innilam Aiññuṟṟuc ciṉna
m pāttiyāl vakaiceyvār nikki svā mi bho kam Ā
ṭṭaivaṭṭa nel 6 taṇṇiraṭṭum pirāmaṇa
ṉukku nicati nel ruvar pirāmaṇar Uṇṇa Iva
ṉey Aṭṭuvippatāka nicatanel 4 10 m Āka nicati
nellu pe kumbha nāyaṟumutal Aiñcu tiṅkaḷukku
nel Ampalameḻukuvāḷukku nicati nel ka
Āṭṭaivaṭṭam neṟ 10 4 viḷakkeṇṇai nicata
Iv nel � Āṭṭaivaṭṭam nel
ṅkukāvaṉukku nel
tiṅkaṇāḷ nicatam Iruvar pirāmaṇar Uṇṇa nicatam Arici 10- A kuttal � yāl nel ḍa kku nel �4 ḍa nāḻikku nel
nālvarkku �kkaṟikkum Uppukku nel 3 � Āka nicati nel ba� Āka Aiñcu tiṅka ṇāḷaikku nel 3 10 6 � putukkuppuṟattukku
Āṭṭaivaṭṭam nel � mum Āka nel 7� nā kkum nivantamāka Ivvūrc cavai yāre Irakṣippārākac cantrādi ttaval niṟkacce
ytu kaṉmel veṭṭuvitteṉ coḻapperunteviyāṉa paṭṭaṉmalliyeṉ .
Digital edition of SII 8.612 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
